headers.usage: Hero titles, section headers, prominent stats. Never center-align by default.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, and intake form descriptions.

visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: GRID BORDERS & TACTICAL MINIMALISM. No soft shadows. Use 1px sharp borders.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm maximum. Sharp edges for industrial feel.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use CSS noise texture (opacity 0.02) over the main background to prevent it from feeling digital flat. It must feel like raw material.

grids_and_layouts.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. py-20 or py-32 for sections. gap-8 to gap-12 for bento grids.
grids_and_layouts.hero: min-h-screen, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, image background with heavy #0A0F1E overlay (opacity 85%).
grids_and_layouts.specializations: Bento Grid Mode A (Asymmetric Tetris). Mix tall, wide, and square cards with Grid Borders.
grids_and_layouts.mobile_first: Always start with grid-cols-1. Ensure padding is at least p-4 on mobile edges.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F97316] hover:bg-[#EA580C] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#38BDF8] text-[#38BDF8] hover:bg-[#38BDF8] hover:text-[#0A0F1E] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-colors

forms.inputs: bg-[#0F172A] border border-[#1E293B] text-white focus:border-[#F97316] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F97316] rounded-none px-4 py-3 h-12
forms.labels: text-slate-300 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm mb-2 block
forms.knockout_logic: Implement React state for conditional rendering (e.g., if uncertified, show rejection message).

cards.base: bg-[#0F172A] border border-[#1E293B] p-8 hover:border-[#38BDF8] transition-colors group
cards.content: Use Ice Blue (#38BDF8) for icons and subtle hover reveals.

components.sticky_mobile_cta: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-4 bg-[#0A0F1E]/95 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-slate-800 z-50 md:hidden flex justify-center items-center

motion.hover: High-contrast color shifts. Slight translate-x-1 on links.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use intersection observer or simple CSS animations.

accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactable elements (CRITICAL for mobile workers).
accessibility.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA against dark backgrounds. Use drop-shadow on text over images.
accessibility.test_ids: Add data-testid to ALL forms, buttons, and section wrappers (e.g., data-testid='hero-apply-btn').

media.image_constraints: max-h-[80vh] on mobile. Wrap images in containers with overflow-hidden and grayscale to maintain the brand tone.

image_urls.description: Majestic offshore oil platform under a bright sky. CRITICAL: Add bg-[#0A0F1E]/80 overlay to make it dark and fit the theme.
Welder wearing protective gear and welding metal. Represents the skilled tradesman.
Excavator working on a snowy, wooded hillside. Represents heavy arctic operations.
A skilled welder works with a torch in an industrial environment.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Use raw HTML elements (div, section) + Tailwind for structural layouts. Customize Shadcn forms for the specific #0F172A backgrounds and #1E293B borders.
instructions_to_main_agent.font_injection: Add Google Fonts link for Barlow and Barlow Condensed in the index.html or global layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.css_vars: Avoid Vercel/Stripe looks. No generic soft drop-shadows. Use harsh 1px borders.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Use Shadcn components for complex logic, but strip rounded borders and soft shadows. Apply industrial styling.
instructions_to_main_agent.tracking: Embed mock or real placeholders for GA4 and Facebook Pixel in the head.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px sharp borders.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters for sticky navigation and mobile CTAs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g. transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Left-align text for better readability.
Always use modern button styles (in this case, sharp-edged, high-contrast tactical buttons).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons. Use standard icon libraries (lucide-react).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
For .js files, use standard React function components with PropTypes if needed, avoid TypeScript syntax.
